puzzle.title: The Unwavering Patient One
puzzle.intro: In the annals of prophetic history, few have endured such profound loss and physical affliction with unshakeable faith. This figure's story is a timeless lesson in patience and trust in divine wisdom. Who is this soul?
clues: I was chosen by Allah to deliver a message, but my greatest test came not through rejection, but through personal calamity.
My wealth, my livestock, and my children were taken from me, one after another.
My body was covered with sores, and I was left alone except for the support of my spouse.
I cried out to my Lord, acknowledging my suffering and seeking His mercy.
I was instructed to strike the ground with my foot, and a refreshing spring gushed forth.
Allah restored my health and gave me a new family and even more wealth than I had before.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being separated from family and sold into slavery
Being tested with a golden calf

location.label: Key Element
options: A staff that turned into a serpent

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Receiving a son in old age

puzzle.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ بِنُصْبٍۢ وَعَذَابٍ
puzzle.verse: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment." (38:41)
